title: PixelBlades PBR Addon
description: A PBR addon created for pixelblades resource packs that make tools shiny!
body:
# PixelBlades PRB Addon
![Diamond axe with PBR applied](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d5fb202b8ad727811d60d4825d0a357f1f0c97c_0.webp)

An Addon Resource pack that adds subtle PBR, created solely to work with [pixelblades](https://modrinth.com/collection/uBtkjTQc).

This should work with either variants of pixelblades, The regular one, and the 2D one

### Notes:
- This addon is best used with **[Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)** _high preset;_ as all my testing was done on it.

- To use it you need to enable labPBR in the shaders settings.


![PBR on off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb5403a1c8b7ff486607582295ec5f19088f3ca0_0.webp)
### **Check out my other Resource packs**

[![PixelBlades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/203dacdeff3225b7fe133c21ef85201bb0879eb0_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/project/pixelblades) [![PixelBlades 2D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13b973dbee0739aa12b14bbccea286938b899105.png)](https://modrinth.com/project/pixelblades2d)

if you have any ideas you want to share or encounter any issues and want to report, you can **dm me on instagram: [@mr.payy](https://www.instagram.com/mr.payy/)**
